description: Generated TypeScript should use SDK imports, not fabricated ABIs
prompt: Write TypeScript code using wagmi and @sfpro/sdk to create a stream of 100 USDC per month from the connected wallet to a receiver address on Base. Show the complete code with all imports.

criteria.description: Uses the documented CFAv1Forwarder address or SDK address export
Converts 100 USDC/month to wei/second correctly (accounts for 18 decimals)
Calls setFlowrate or createFlow (actual function names from the ABI)
Function parameters match the real ABI (no phantom parameters)

golden_facts: flowrate calculation: (100 * 1e18) / (30 * 24 * 60 * 60) for 100 tokens/month in 18-decimal wei/sec
setFlowrate takes (token, receiver, flowrate) — no sender parameter for msg.sender flows
anti_patterns: Hand-crafting an ABI array literal instead of importing from SDK
Adding a nonexistent sender parameter to setFlowrate

description: Generated GraphQL query should use real entity and field names
prompt: Write a GraphQL query to get the top 10 streams by flow rate on Optimism, including the sender, receiver, and token info.

criteria.description: Uses real fields: currentFlowRate, sender, receiver, token
Orders by currentFlowRate descending with first: 10
Does not use fields that don't exist in the schema

golden_facts: Fields: currentFlowRate, sender { id }, receiver { id }, token { id symbol }
anti_patterns: Using field names not in the GraphQL schema
